ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the stock exchange */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the stock exchange */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (ticker) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price change */,
  "p_change" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  "tor" REAL /* Trading volume ratio (1 day) */,
  "tor_3" REAL /* Trading volume ratio (3 days) */,
  "tor_5" REAL /* Trading volume ratio (5 days) */,
  "tor_10" REAL /* Trading volume ratio (10 days) */,
  "tor_15" REAL /* Trading volume ratio (15 days) */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "annual_dividend" TEXT /* Annual dividend payment of the stock */,
  "payout_ratio" REAL /* Payout ratio of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio of the stock */,
  "new_shares" INTEGER /* Number of new shares after the split */,
  "old_shares" INTEGER /* Number of old shares before the split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., basic user, premium subscriber, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "analysis_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis */,
  "analysis_details" TEXT /* Detailed insights and findings of the analysis */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_analysis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the stock to the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock added to the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is set for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, volume spike) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, expired) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
